title: 驚愕ッ！理事長のサプライズ！

text_block_list.name: Academy PA
text_block_list.text:
Trainer <username>, please
come to the director's office immediately.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The announcement sounds serious, so I make my
way to the director's office in something of a
fluster.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Please enter.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Do take a seat.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The silence is downright unsettling! As the
wordless minutes start to feel like hours...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...I grow more and more uneasy. Has something
terrible happened?

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Gratitude!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
We called you here today to express our
gratitude to you, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Indeed! Your trainee <chrname>...

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Well, she's put on a brilliant display throughout
this vital third year in her Twinkle Series career!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
We've no doubt that the track she blazed will
serve as a shining beacon for not only her
classmates, but the next generation as well!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
As such, we are... INCREDIBLY grateful! Splendid
work, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Right! Also... Expectations! I greatly look forward
to the unprecedented glory you're sure to achieve
in the future!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
I'd like to thank you for your continued efforts as
well. Please don't hesitate to let me know if
there's anything I can assist you with.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems all they had in store was a heap of praise!
I'm very appreciative, of course, but something's
still bugging me.
choice_data_list: What was with that awkward silence?

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: A surprise! Naturally!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Yes! I figured building a little suspense would
sweeten the payoff!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: I-I'm sorry. I did try to stop her...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...There's a thing or three I'd like to question, but
I'm happy to know I'm appreciated.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Later, I tell <chrname> about what
happened and we share in the joy!
